description: A demolition drive targeting unauthorized constructions in Shalimar Bagh's Haiderpur area commenced Sunday, following Supreme Court validation of road widening plans. The drive aims to remove encroachments that have significantly narrowed the road, impacting emergency services.

description: Veteran playback singer Suman Kalyanpur, known for her voice similar to Lata Mangeshkar, passed away at 89. She enchanted listeners for decades with her versatile repertoire in Hindi, Marathi, and other regional languages. Her demise marks the end of a golden era in Indian music.

description: Virat Kohli produced a masterful unbeaten 75 after Royal Challengers Bengaluru's (RCB) pace attack dismantled Gujarat Titans at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday. Rajat Patidar's men secured a second successive IPL title with a commanding five-wicket victory. Rajat Patidar also became only the third captain to have won back-to-back IPL titles after MS Dhoni and Rohit Sharma.

Hormuz to home: How Middle East conflict is rewriting your kitchen math
description: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are directly impacting household budgets, driving up prices for everyday essentials like cooking oil, milk, and bread. Soaring global crude oil prices and a weakening rupee are increasing import, fuel, and transportation costs, leading to a domino effect on consumer goods and even healthcare services.

title: 'Panchayat' Season 5 star Chandan Roy aka Vikas decodes Phulera’s next chapter
description: Fans eagerly await Panchayat Season 5, with actor Chandan Roy, who plays Vikas, hinting at an exciting new chapter. He described the upcoming season as 'Bigger, better and more beautiful,' promising a deeper exploration of characters and their evolving relationships. The show's authentic portrayal of rural Indian life continues to resonate universally, making Phulera's return highly anticipated.

title: Declan Rice upset over attacks on girlfriend Lauren Fryer before World Cup
description: Arsenal star midfielder Declan Rice has been eyeing the 2026 World Cup but his relationship with his girlfriend, Lauren Fryer, has continued to dominate the headlines, even as their relationship gets brutally mocked. While Declan Rice has often praised his girlfriend and the mother of his child, Lauren Fryer, for her support, he has often been mocked for her appearance. Amid this, Declan Rice’s comments about how he feels about it have sparked chaos.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Packers, Lions emerge for Colts’ $33m QB landing spot
description: The Indianapolis Colts’ star player Anthony Richardson is actively seeking a trade since the last few weeks even as he continues to attend the team’s OTAs, sparking confusion among all the fans. While a number of teams have been linked to him, it seems the Green Bay Packers and the Detroit Lions have emerged as strong landing spots for the star player.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Blake Lively reportedly hits breaking point amid Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce fallout
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have remained distant and private about their feelings for the Hollywood power couple, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds, as they gear up to get married in the next few weeks in New York City. As speculations swirl about whether Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds will be attending Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s high profile wedding, it seems the actress has reached a breaking point in her life.
